green_tea_leaves.name: Green Tea Leaves
green_tea_leaves.desc: Fresh green leaves. Highly demanded by tea masters.

wild_root.name: Wild Root
wild_root.desc: A crunchy root foraged from muddy ponds.

rice_bowl.name: Rice Bowl
rice_bowl.desc: Savory meal. Restores 30 HP and 15 Stamina.

wind_feather.name: Wind Feather
wind_feather.desc: A glossy dark feather carrying currents of wind.

demon_horn.name: Demon Horn
demon_horn.desc: A heavy, dark crimson horn vibrating with power.

wooden_sword.name: Wooden Sword
wooden_sword.desc: A heavy wooden training sword. Adds +3 Attack.

steel_sword.name: Righteousness Blade of Righteousness
steel_sword.desc: An old legendary, Abandoned by the heavens. Adds +12 Attack.

golden_elixir.name: Golden Elixir
golden_elixir.desc: An imperial elixir. Fully restores Health and Stamina.

wooden_staff.name: Wooden Staff
wooden_staff.desc: A simple, light wooden staff. Adds +2 Attack.

refined_blade.name: Refined Blade
refined_blade.desc: A battle-worn curved blade. Perfect Condition. Adds +6 Attack.

demon_kings_sword.name: Demon King's Sword
demon_kings_sword.desc: A blade of singular malice, forged from cooling star-fire and quenched in the blood of fallen monarchs (sprite test). Adds +20 Attack.

eye_of_artic.name: Eye of Artic
eye_of_artic.desc: Legendary artifact belonging to Alduin or the ancient dragons, this usually refers to the Eye of Magnus. Adds +5 Defense and +12 Attack.

rusted_blade.name: Rusted Blade
rusted_blade.desc: An old, battle-worn curved blade. Adds +4 Attack.

agile_dagger.name: Agile Dagger
agile_dagger.desc: A short, agile steel sword used by stealth agents. Adds +6 Attack.

iron_club.name: Iron Club
iron_club.desc: A brutal, iron-spiked club capable of crushing bone. Adds +10 Attack.

straw_hat.name: Straw Hat
straw_hat.desc: A simple woven straw hat. Adds +1 Defense.

horned_demon_helmet.name: Horned Demon Helmet
horned_demon_helmet.desc: Forged from blackened iron and etched with infernal runes, this jagged helm is topped by a pair of obsidian-like horns that pulse with a faint, rhythmic crimson light. Adds +12 Defense.

wooden_shield.name: Wooden Shield
wooden_shield.desc: A round wooden shield reinforced with iron rings. Adds +2 Defense.

iron_plate_armor.name: Iron Plate Armor
iron_plate_armor.desc: Traditional iron plate armor. Adds +5 Defense.

lucky_amulet.name: Lucky Amulet
lucky_amulet.desc: A protective temple amulet. Adds +1 Attack and +1 Defense.

mana_sever_dagger.name: Mana Sever Dagger
mana_sever_dagger.desc: This ritual blade is crafted from a single, translucent shard of void-glass that hums with a dissonant, jagged vibration.

einherjars_will.name: Einherjar's Will
einherjars_will.desc: Here stands all the souls and blood of those send to eternal rest by Valhalla's elite army. We shall honor the bond of those who share our war home will. Peace to all fallen souls.

behelit_sword.name: Behelit Sword
behelit_sword.desc: Through time it shears the wrath of doom, A swords resolve cursed ever higher. The Behelit Sword, in midnights gloom, cuts open Hell on wings of desire.

virtue.name: Virtue
virtue.desc: This relic is a masterclass in conflicting design, blending the divine aesthetics of high-paladin armor with the chaotic, aggressive edges of the abyss.
